name: Alehouse Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the meat in a roasting pan and brown uncovered in the oven.
2. Season the meat with pepper.
3. Dissolve the onion soup mix in water.
4. Mix ketchup and beer together and add to the soup mixture.
5. Pour the mixture over the meat.
6. Cover the pan with foil and roast for 2 hours or until tender.
7. Add flour to 1/4 cup of pan drippings to make a paste.
8. Stir the paste into the gravy to make it thicker.
9. Return the pan to the oven and continue roasting for an additional 30 minutes.
10. Slice the meat across the grain and serve with gravy.
